title: horkelia elata
intro: Horkelia elata, also known as tall horkelia, is a perennial plant species in the heath family (Ericaceae) that is native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Horkelia elata can be prepared as an herbal tea, salve, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
